downloadCta.headline: Ready to move forward?
downloadCta.subtitle: This is what working with ZNAS looks like in practice. The full proposal is below.

summary.headline: Deals find you now.
summary.body:
You told us the hunt eats your week — chasing listings that fit, running the numbers, deciding fast enough to move before someone else does. So ZNAS built Haven Deals: a fix & flip engine that turns it around. Properties that clear your buy box surface straight to you, with the numbers already run and every figure sourced.

The product is built — this proposal is your walkthrough of it, loaded with example deals from your own High Desert and Inland Empire market so you can click through exactly how it works today. From here, we wire it to your live deal flow and it goes to work.

howItWorks.intro: ZNAS runs this engagement as a team — you're not handed off to a single point of contact with no backup. Scope and pricing are set together in the alignment meeting before anything starts, and nothing ships without your sign-off.

cards.title: Month-to-month
cards.body: No long-term lock-in. Pause or end the engagement with 15 days' notice — no penalties.

cards.title: You approve every move
cards.body: ZNAS recommends; you decide. Nothing is executed without your sign-off first.

cards.title: Three phases, clear exits
cards.body: Assessment, Transformation Proposal, Execution. Each phase ends with a deliverable you review before the next one begins.

initiative.headline: The digital foundation, handled too.
initiative.body: Alongside Deals, we're recovering your four suspended Google Business Profiles. The full gameplan is already drafted — download it below. It maps what starts this week without any access from you, the one 60-second on-camera verification only you can do, and how the appeals are sequenced so nothing wastes one of Google's limited review windows.

realEstateAgent.headline: It does the hunting. You make the calls.
realEstateAgent.intro: You said it in our first conversation: property research and bidding takes too long — finding listings that actually fit, running the numbers, deciding fast enough to move. Haven Deals does that work continuously in the background and only surfaces what's worth your attention. Here's what that means in practice.

points.title: Deals find you
points.body: Set your buy box once. When a property clears it — margin, ROI, condition, location — it surfaces to you with the numbers already run. No more manual searching.

points.title: Every number, sourced
points.body: Comps, after-repair value, purchase price, renovation — each figure shows where it came from, so you can trust it and defend it. Nothing inflated.

points.title: Your time back
points.body: Research and comparison happen in seconds, not afternoons — so your hours go to the walk-throughs, calls, and decisions only you can make.

realEstateAgent.note: Haven Deals runs on MemQL, ZNAS's production-grade AI platform — built for you and owned by you.

productShowcase.headline: See it working — then try it yourself.
productShowcase.intro: Three stages, each building on the last: a phone that surfaces deals, a desktop workbench for offers and pipeline, and VERA — an analyst working while you sleep. Everything here is the real interface, loaded with example deals from your market. Watch each stage, then open the demos and click through them yourself — every screen is live.

stages.title: Stage 1 · Radar
stages.blurb: Your fix & flip radar, on your phone. Deals find you: lock-screen alerts when a property clears your buy box, every number honest and sourced, renovation estimates you control — and a look under the hood at memQL, the engine we built ourselves.

stages.title: Stage 2 · Offers & pipeline
stages.blurb: The radar grows a desk. A full desktop workbench — map, listings, and deal detail side by side — a human-in-the-loop offer checkpoint that never sends without you, and a pipeline board that walks every deal from approved to closed. Map, listings, pipeline: one backend, always live, in memQL.

stages.title: Stage 3 · VERA
stages.blurb: Meet Vera — her full potential. Proactive offer suggestions while you sleep, overnight morning briefs, receipts behind every number, and an analyst panel on your workbench. And under all of it: memQL — ours, our own creation — where every deal and every version is remembered, and the door AI uses to reach your data stays locked until you say so.

productShowcase.fullDemoBlurb: All three stages in one build — exactly what Stage 3 delivers, kept as the single source of truth. Open it and click through the whole thing.
